topic: Foundation — shared context, route revision, booking status
decision: Route revised to drop Switzerland; 5 confirmed bookings updated; static HTML established as primary reference.
Stop 4 → Swabian Alb (Blaubeuren) [9.75, 48.51]; Stop 5 → Wachau (Melk) [15.33, 48.22]. All 3 legs ≤4h50m (Mapbox-verified). 3 iterations: Lindau/Starnberger See/Augsburg all failed the 5h limit.

topic: Map Interface UI — Rich Journey View
decision: Rebuilt trip viewer as desktop two-panel layout (300px sidebar + full-height Mapbox outdoors map) with colour-coded segment time labels on the route line and a gated POI discovery toggle.

topic: Trip Viewer Data Concepts — Information Architecture
decision: Restructured trip viewer sidebar into three-layer IA: summary bar (trip metrics), day-grouped itinerary with booking status badges, and outbound/return section markers. Empty fields hidden, not dashed.
